brief_html: Provides the Client with the proper response to a S>C 0x5E SID_WARDEN message. If the Client receives result 0x00, then the Client should respond to Battle.net with the Data in C>S 0x5E SID_WARDEN, otherwise the Client should not respond to the message.
format:
(UINT8) Command
(UINT32) Cookie
(UINT8) Result code
(UINT16) Length of Data
(VOID) Data
remarks_html:
Provides the Client with the proper response to a S>C 0x5E SID_WARDEN message. If the Client receives result 0x00, then the Client should respond to Battle.net with the Data in C>S 0x5E SID_WARDEN, otherwise the Client should not respond to the message.

Result Description
0x00 Success
0x01 Unable to find your allocated packet handler
0x02 Incoming data is corrupted
0x03 Warden module is not loaded yet
0x04 Error executing warden module
0x05 Unsupported Battle.net client/game
0x06 Warden hack check error
0x07 Warden check invalid
0x08 Incoming warden packet unsupported
0x09 Unsupported warden info type
0xFD Invalid password
0xFE Invalid username
0xFF Your request was corrupted
